author: caravello878962
content:
The Encrypt the Mempool! Coalition (https://x.com/encryptmempool) recently posted a 3 ETH (~$5,400) bounty on POIDH for substantive feedback on the encrypted mempool proposals (EIP-8105 & EIP-8184).

Looking for technical critiques, attack vectors, implementation concerns, tradeoff analysis, and MEV/incentive analysis.

If you're a core protocol researcher, dev, and you've been following encrypted mempool research, we'd love to see you dive in and add your perspective! Or please share around with others!

Discussion thread: https://ethereum-magicians.org/t/encrypt-the-mempool-provide-feedback-on-the-draft-eips-8105-8184/28804

Poidh bounty: https://poidh.xyz/mainnet/bounty/9
